description: Direct eval() mutating a captured array/object in-place (member-set o.k=v / new prop / push / pop / shift / unshift / splice / subscript write) with the mutation visible after eval returns, plus closures created inside eval reading a captured caller var (map/reduce over addition). Object identity is preserved on copy-in so mutations propagate through the shared heap; the engine registers the tag/validate/array-mutator/box-array runtime symbols the fragments reference. Round-2 engine follow-ups #1 (read case) and #2. Matches Node.
